cards.name: 5 of Cups
cards.interpretation: loss, grief, disappointment, sadness, mourning, discontent, feeling let down

cards.name: 2 of Swords, reversed

cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.interpretation: honest, independent, principled, fair, constructive criticism, objective, perceptive
